posts.author: huysgt (HarryNg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday Community,

We’ve noticed teams here struggling with a common workflow gap: Google Tasks staying separate from monday.com boards.

The challenge:

  • Tasks created in Google Docs don’t flow to Monday
  • Google Calendar reminders stay separate from Monday boards
  • Manual recreation or things get missed
  • Two separate task ecosystems that don’t talk

We built a solution to bridge this gap:

  • Syncs Google Tasks directly to Monday boards
  • Bidirectional updates (changes flow both ways)
  • Simple setup, preserves your existing workflow
  • Connects your Google Workspace tasks to Monday automatically

The app is live on Monday’s marketplace with a 14-day free trial.

Try it out here:



Would love to hear from anyone who’s been dealing with this workflow challenge - does this solution fit what you’ve been looking for?
